name: Binggrae Co., Ltd.
summary: Binggrae Co., Ltd. produces and distributes various refrigerated and frozen products in South Korea. It offers ice cream, milk drinks/cheese, fermented milk, coffee/beverages, and snacks/desserts under various brands. The company also exports its products. It operates stores under the name of Soft Lab and Yellow Caf√É¬©. The company was formerly known as Daeil Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Binggrae Co., Ltd. in February 1982. Binggrae Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Namyangju, South Korea.
